changelog:
✨ Modern UI & Glassmorphism: v1.2.2 brings the premium 'Clear Windows' look. 
🔹 Glassmorphic Notifications: Pop-up windows now feature background blur and translucency for a sleek aesthetic.
🔹 What's New Feature: Track all recent changes directly from the Profile screen.
🔹 System-Wide Polish: All major app dialogs (Delete, Terms, Report, Updates) have been modernized.
🔹 Performance: Faster UI responsiveness and smoother transitions across all screens.
